# Transcrição: 07-Congratulations!

- **Fonte:** 07-Congratulations!
- **Duração:** 01:09

---

## [00:00 - 01:09]

Congratulations, you are now a meta advertiser. This is a big day. I'm going to give you a fist bump all the way from the Mastermind Studio because very few business owners, course creators, coaches actually take the time to go through this. But I just want you to know that this is the first step towards an incredible path and an incredible journey of growing and building your business. I believe Meta Ads and Paid Advertising online is one of the greatest tools to create more impact, more views, more engagement with your business, and ultimately more revenue than just about anything else. So my final piece of advice to you is this. When things happen and when you have questions about what to do and how to make your campaigns better, don't give up, push through, and go and search those answers out online. There are an unlimited amount of resources and trainings available to you on the internet, and there are courses, other trainings on YouTube, and if you ask the right questions, you're going to get better and better and better over time. So in closing, congratulations, you now are a meta advertiser.
